# Stop Losing High-Ticket Patients to Missed Calls & Slow Follow-Up.

Stop relying on manual follow-up. Clinic OS is made for longevity clinics. By combining modern AI-augmented automation with human strategy and industry experience, we capture every lead, reactivate your database, and dominate local search. Book more consults without adding staff, installed in 14 days.

[See the 14-Day Install →](https://www.longevityclinicmarketing.com/14-day-install)

or [Get the pricing & tiers](https://www.longevityclinicmarketing.com/#pricing)

Built for longevity clinics. Backed by [Spannr](https://spannr.com/) (the Longevity Marketplace).

Get The Playbook

## The real leak isn't "SEO"—it's speed-to-lead.

After-hours calls → voicemail → lost consults

Web leads wait hours for replies → they move on

GBP half-optimized → calls go to competitors

No proof → can't see what's working

Instant reply via AI front desk + Missed-Call Text-Back

GBP tuned (categories, services, posts, Q&A) to drive calls

Review & reactivation that fill consult calendars

Simple dashboard with calls, bookings, transcripts you can hear

## What We Install in 14 Days (Your Fast-Start)

### 1\. Visibility

We overhaul your Google Business Profile, tune local SEO, and clean up citations to ensure you get found by patients actively searching for longevity services.

### 2\. Conversion

We install an AI front desk on your site and activate Missed-Call Text-Back to instantly engage every lead, answer questions, and book consults 24/7.

### 3\. Proof

You get a simple, clean dashboard where you can see calls, listen to recordings, read transcripts, and track booked consults—tying our work directly to ROI.

## Experience the AI Front Desk in Action

Don't just take our word for it. Listen to a real recording of our AI handling an after-hours patient inquiry and booking a consult completely on autopilot.

### Listen to the Call

Recorded live: Monday, 8:15 PM (After Hours)

0:451:32

**Did you catch that?** The AI handled the scheduling, answered a specific question about hours, and sent a confirmation text—all without a human lifting a finger.

LIVE TRANSCRIPT

\[20:15\]

Patient:

Hi, are you open on Saturdays?

\[20:15\]

AI Front Desk:

We are closed on Saturdays, but I can help you book an appointment for next week. Our next available slot is Monday at 10:30 AM. Would that work for you?

\[20:16\]

Patient:

Yes, that's perfect.

\[20:16\]

AI Front Desk:

Great! I've just sent a confirmation to your phone. We look forward to seeing you at The Longevity Institute!
